_comment: Chantier 5.C — i18n purged of pre-pivot residuals: 'transparency' section (win_rate/sharpe/total_r/max_dd/paper-trading curve) removed, FREE/LITE/PRO/PRO+ tiers → Découverte/Approfondie/Intégrale, 'value_2' reworded without paper-trading or edge. NOTE: these messages are loaded by NextIntlClientProvider but NOT yet consumed (components use hard-coded FR strings). TODO 5.D: validate/wire these keys during copy finishing, or remove.

landing.hero_title: Understand the gold market without being told what to do.
landing.hero_subtitle: MIA Markets generates sourced contextual analyses for XAU/USD — transparent by design.
landing.value_1_body: Every analysis cites its sources. No hallucination, no recommendation.
landing.value_2_body: No promise of gain, no edge claimed — a tool for understanding, not a trading system.
landing.value_3_body: Volatility regime, cross-asset correlations, macro calendar — to understand, not to trade.

disclaimer.short: Educational algorithmic analysis. Not investment advice.
disclaimer.long: MIA Markets produces editorial contextual analyses, not personalised recommendations. Compliant with EU 2024/2811 and the March 2026 finfluencer regulation.
